It's next to the 5-College Book Repository parking lot.  There's technically a gate but I've never seen it closed. Access: Public.
A few dozen apple trees maintained as a small orchard.  More by the bus circle in center campus. Access: Public.
There are maybe twenty or so apple trees here and more by the Eric Carle Museum. Access: Public.
A variety of small apple trees. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Thorny thorn plants around the area, watch out! Lots of fruit, but not many branches are within reach, and the ground is a bit steep. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
Tons of black walnut trees in the area, but there's one in particular by the back parking area that's pretty fruitful. Seems to pick up about late September. Falling Fruit season: August-unknown.

On the left side of the plum brook trail head are several highbush blueberries. They have presented flowers and unripe fruit, I have yet to see them successfully ripen. Access: Public.
